final:
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input d,
    input set,
    input clr,
    output reg q
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (set) begin
        q <= 1;
    end else if (clr) begin
        q <= 0;
    end else begin
        q <= d;
    end
end

endmodule
